column2: Find something that isn't right? Mail me @ Grubu Niminenson in game and I will fix it.
In search of someone to take of this project as a whole. If you are interested, please mail me in game. Thanks
Updated script with new esi link (https://esi.evetech.net)
Project taken over by Nolak with Karr's blessing. Updating gas/ore sites.
Still need more ore scans.
Finalized update on Ore Anomalies.
Project taken over by Grubu with Nolak's blessing.
Added Escalation note to Core Bastions
Updated: Perimeter Checkpoint, Wave 3. From 2 to 3 Emergent Patroller. Thanks Zuntrax
Added DTA note to Class 6, "The Mirror." Thanks SYNDE & Gang
Updated: Drifter note to be a bit more clear. Requested by Harkin Issier

Updated: Unsecured Frontier Enclave Relay. Removed notes due to lack of clarity.

Updated: Forgotten Frontier Recursive Depot, Wave 1. Rat Were Just Completely Wrong. Thanks Mallore Aulmais

Issue Report: Issue with font sizes on some browsers, work around, use Incognito Mode until it passes

Updated: Upgraded Avengers, Spawn on first capital but not the following capital types. Thanks patch notes
Updated: Drifter Recon Battleship, Neut amount changed from 0 to -100. Thanks patch notes

Updated: Perimeter Camp, Wave 2, From 5 to 3 Emergent Patroller. Reducing payout to 9,600,00 down from 10,400,000. Thanks Ilandor Morrhart
Updated: Drifter in an attempt to make language more clear

Updated: Solar Cell, Wave 2. From 3 Awakened Defenders to 2. Updated Site Payout also. Thanks Evie
Issue with Tabs being at the bottom, ratherthan the top, Seems to be a Google thing, so RiP

Update: Tab issue has been resolved with a new link. Thanks to Solar Matrix. NEW LINK

Issue Report: The EHP shown is always using the value with the bonus NPC. The ISK shown is always using the value without the bonus NPC. Will Address in the near future

Updated: Ordinary Perimeter Reservoir, Sentry Towers replaced. Thanks CCP
